SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
APhase
Phase A of the simulation, responsible for selecting the next scheduled time that should be processed.
App
JavaFX application entry point for the simulation UI.
BPhase
Phase B of the simulation, responsible for processing service start and end events scheduled for the current time.
Controller
JavaFX controller for the simulation UI, including input parsing, graph updates, delay controls, and status text updates.
CPhase
Phase C of the simulation, responsible for routing waiting customers to an available service point or rescheduling them when all parallels are busy.
Customer
Stores timing information for a simulated customer.
Detailinator
Utility for formatting detail log text before it is displayed in the UI.
Event
Represents a scheduled simulation event and the service point it targets.
Event.Type
Supported event types in the simulation pipeline.
EventQueue
Thread-safe priority queue for scheduled simulation events.
PhaseQueue
Stores customers in separate priority queues for each simulation phase.
ServicePoint
Represents a service station in the simulation, including its parallel service stations, routing odds, service timing, utilization, and completed-customer metrics.
ServicePointTree
Tree structure that models the service-point routing hierarchy used by the simulation.
ServicePointType
Routing helper methods for choosing child and parallel service points.
Simulation
Runs the discrete-event call-center simulation and coordinates all simulation phases, event queues, generated customers, UI updates, and persistence of performance results.
SimulationResultRepository
Persists finished simulation performance data using the schema in Queries/Project.sql.
